americas.title: Director of Residence · UHNW family
americas.blurb: A UHNW family in Palm Beach seeks a Director of Residence to lead the household. Starting salary around $300k plus a full benefits package. A top-tier estate leadership role.

americas.title: House Manager / Personal Assistant
americas.blurb: A family of technology executives in the AI industry, newly welcoming their first child, seeks a House Manager and PA to run the primary residence. Discretion, efficiency and proactive problem-solving valued.

americas.title: Estate Head Butler · CEO & family

americas.title: Executive Personal Assistant / House Manager

americas.title: House Manager / Personal Assistant · Three residences
americas.blurb: A high-profile principal seeks a polished house manager to oversee three luxury residences in Dallas, Austin and Aspen. Combines house management, PA support and butler-level service.

americas.title: Senior Personal Assistant to the Principal
americas.blurb: Discreet and proactive senior PA. Day-to-day logistics, calendaring, travel and a wide range of personal tasks arising at short notice. Service mindset and flawless execution.

americas.title: Personal Assistant · Residential projects & household
americas.blurb: Oversee residential construction projects, manage household operations and provide comprehensive support to the principals. For someone who takes ownership and executes without direction.

americas.title: Houseman / Junior House Manager

americas.blurb: A full-time estate manager for a private San Francisco residence: household operations, staff and vendor coordination, and the standards of a UHNW home.

europe.blurb: Exceptional private property in the heart of Saint-Tropez. A strategic role for a profile used to confidential environments and the highest levels of service. Operational excellence, absolute discretion.

europe.title: House Manager · Secondary residence
europe.blurb: Interior management of the home alongside the existing team. Permanent contract, available immediately. Staff accommodation is provided.

europe.title: House Manager · Private luxury chalet
europe.blurb: General upkeep and household management of a privately owned luxury chalet. A strong background in high-end hospitality is expected.

europe.title: Versatile House Manager · Family home
europe.blurb: Upkeep of the house, meal preparation for the family, and after-school care of a nine-year-old. Permanent position, available immediately.

europe.title: Personal Assistant to a renowned music artist
europe.blurb: A renowned artist travelling regularly, seeking an exceptional PA to join a small dedicated team. Significant flexibility expected in days and hours.

europe.title: Travelling Housekeeper · Private residences
europe.blurb: Support a respectful principal across private residences in the UK and France, with a long-term base in the UK. A rare lifestyle position offering stability and travel.

europe.title: House Manager · Six residences
europe.blurb: Oversee the smooth operation of six private residences across Wales and Southern Spain. Full ownership of day-to-day logistics, suppliers and travel across two countries.

mideast.blurb: Comprehensive administrative and organisational support. Full-time, live-out, long-term. Requires discretion, reliability and a high level of personal integrity.

mideast.blurb: Support three partners across HR, administrative, contractual and operational matters. Emphatically not an entry-level position: a polished professional with a proven record in a demanding environment.
